tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests package

Submodules

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_denitrification module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_denitrification.test_calculate_denitrification_amount(nitrates: float, denitrification_rate: float, temp_factor: float, percent_carbon: float) → None

Tests that the amount of nitrified nitrates is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_denitrification.test_denitrify() → None
Tests that the main routine correctly gets the amount of nitrates nitrified and removes it from the nitrate

pool.

Notes

This test achieves full code coverage by creating a soil profile in which the top (first), third, and fourth layers should have nitrate removed by denitrification, while the second layer should not. This is done by setting the denitrification_threshold_water_content attribute of the top, third, and fourth layers to be below the mocked nutrient_cycling_water_factor, and above for the second.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_humus_mineralization module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_humus_mineralization.test_determine_intra_organic_mineralization(active: float, stable: float) → None

Tests that the amount of nitrogen determined to be transferred from the active organic to stable organic pool are calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_humus_mineralization.test_determine_organic_to_nitrate_mineralization(active: float, temp_factor: float, water_factor: float, mineralization_rate: float) → float

Tests that the correct amount of active organic nitrogen mineralized is calculated.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_humus_mineralization.test_mineralize_organic_nitrogen(active_to_stable: float, active_to_nitrate: float, temp: float) → None

Tests that the main routine of HumusMineralization correctly transfers nitrogen between the right pools.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_adjust_active_organic_nitrogen_concentration(active_nitrogen_concentration: float) → None

Tests that the active organic nitrogen concentration is correctly adjusted.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_calculate_eroded_organic_nitrogen(nitrogen: float, density: float, depth: float, area: float, sediment: float) → float

Tests that the amount of organic nitrogen lost to eroded sediment is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_calculate_inorganic_nitrogen_loss(nitrogen_content: float, water_content: float, saturation_content: float, runoff: float, extraction_coefficient: float) → None

Tests that the correct amount of inorganic nitrogen is lost to runoff.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_calculate_nitrogen_lost_to_leaching(nitrogen_content: float, field_capacity: float, percolation: float, extraction_coefficient: float, is_active: bool) → None

Tests that the correct amount of nitrogen is determined to be leached out of a soil layer.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_determine_enrichment_ratio(daily_soil_lost: float) → None

Tests that the enrichment ratio was calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_determine_erosion_nitrogen_loss_content(nitrogen: float, soil_lost: float, enrichment_ratio: float) → None

Tests that the mass of nitrogen lost to erosion is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_determine_leached_nitrogen(nitrogen: float, percolation: float, leaching_coefficient: float) → None

Tests that the amount of nitrogen calculated to percolate out of the current layer is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_determine_nitrogen_concentration(soluble_nitrogen_amount: float, soil_water_runoff_sum: float, saturation_content: float) → None

Tests that the concentration of the inorganic pools NO3/NH4 in the top soil layer was calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_determine_nitrogen_percolation_water_concentration(nitrogen: float, field_capacity: float, percolation: float) → None

Tests that the correct concentration of nitrogen in soil water is determined before leaching.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_determine_nitrogen_runoff_amount(nitrogen_concentration: float, runoff: float, runoff_extraction_coef: float) → None

Tests that the amount of nitrogen runoff for the first layer was calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_erode_nitrogen(nitrates: float, ammonium: float, fresh: float, active: float, stable: float, field_size: float) → None

Tests that nitrogen is properly eroded from the surface of the field.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_leach_and_erode_nitrogen() → None

Tests that the top level routine of this module calls the right helper methods.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_leaching_runoff_erosion.test_leach_nitrogen() → None

Tests that nitrogen is properly removed from a layer and percolated to the next during the leaching process.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_mineralization_decomp module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_mineralization_decomp.test_calculate_nutrient_cycling_residue_composition_factor(nitrogen_ratio: float, phosphorus_ratio: float, nutrient_term: float) → None

Tests that the nutrient cycling residue composition factor is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_mineralization_decomp.test_calculate_nutrient_term_for_residue_composition_factor(ratio: float, constant: float) → None

Tests that the nitrogen and phosphorus ratio terms are calculated correctly for use in calculating the nutrient cycling residue composition factor.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_mineralization_decomp.test_calculate_rate_constant(mineralization_rate: float, composition_factor: float, temp_factor: float, water_factor: float) → float

Tests that the decay rate constant is correctly calculated.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_mineralization_decomp.test_calculate_residue_nutrient_ratio(carbon: float, organic: float, inorganic: float) → None

Tests that the correct carbon-residue ratio is calculated.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_mineralization_decomp.test_mineralize_and_decompose_nitrogen(temp: float, fresh_nitrogen: float, decay_rate: float) → None

Tests that the main routine correctly calculates and updates all necessary values.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_ammonium_loss_fraction(regulator: float) → None

Tests that the fraction of ammonium lost to a given process is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_ammonium_lost_to_process(ammonium_lost: float, actual: float, other: float) → None

Tests that the amount of ammonium lost to a specific process is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_nitrification_regulator(temp_factor: float, water_factor: float) → None

Tests that the nitrification factor is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_nitrification_soil_water_factor(water: float, wilting: float, field: float) → None

Tests that the water factor for nitrification is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_nitrification_volatilization_temp_factor(temp: float) → None

Tests that the temperature factor used by the nitrification volatilization module is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_total_ammonium_lost(ammonium: float, nitrification: float, volatilization: float) → None

Tests that the amount of ammonium lost to nitrification and volatilization is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_volatilization_depth_factor(depth: float) → None

Tests that the volatilization depth factor is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_calculate_volatilization_regulator(temp_factor: float, depth_factor: float, exchange_factor: float) → None

Tests that the volatilization factor is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.nitrogen_cycling_tests.test_nitrification_volatilization.test_do_daily_nitrification_and_volatilization() → None

Tests that the main routine of NitrificationVolatilization correctly calculates and updates attributes.
